GeoHub PWA Icons
================
Place the following PNG files in this folder for full PWA support:

  icon-72.png   — 72×72
  icon-96.png   — 96×96
  icon-128.png  — 128×128
  icon-192.png  — 192×192  (required for Android install)
  icon-512.png  — 512×512  (required for splash + maskable)

Design: dark #04050d background, white "GH" text, gradient border
(linear-gradient 135deg #10b981 → #3b82f6), rounded corners (22% radius).

Generate with any icon tool or use the GeoHub logo mark.
